title: [FIRRTL] Crash with const fields in enum types

features.name: enum with mixed const and non-const element types
features.description: Code should include an enum type definition where some elements have const-qualified types and others have non-const types
features.snippet:
typedef enum {A = 8'd0, B = 16'd1} mixed_enum_t;
const typedef enum {C = 8'd0, D = 8'd1} all_const_enum_t;
